49/* Hook for plugins to get control in ExplainOneQuery() */
50ExplainOneQuery_hook_type ExplainOneQuery_hook = NULL;
51
52/* Hook for plugins to get control in explain_get_index_name() */
53explain_get_index_name_hook_type explain_get_index_name_hook = NULL;
54
55/* per-plan and per-node hooks for plugins to print additional info */
56explain_per_plan_hook_type explain_per_plan_hook = NULL;
57explain_per_node_hook_type explain_per_node_hook = NULL;
58
59/*
60 * Various places within need to convert bytes to kilobytes.  Round these up
61 * to the next whole kilobyte.
62 */
63#define BYTES_TO_KILOBYTES(b) (((b) + 1023) / 1024)
64
65static void ExplainOneQuery(Query *query, int cursorOptions,
66							IntoClause *into, ExplainState *es,
67							ParseState *pstate, ParamListInfo params);

69							JitInstrumentation *ji);
70static void ExplainPrintSerialize(ExplainState *es,
71								  SerializeMetrics *metrics);

73							ExplainState *es);

75static bool ExplainPreScanNode(PlanState *planstate, Bitmapset **rels_used);

77						const char *relationship, const char *plan_name,
78						ExplainState *es);

80							ExplainState *es);

82							PlanState *planstate, List *ancestors,
83							bool useprefix, ExplainState *es);

85					  PlanState *planstate, List *ancestors,
86					  bool useprefix, ExplainState *es);

88						   PlanState *planstate, List *ancestors,
89						   ExplainState *es);
90static void show_upper_qual(List *qual, const char *qlabel,
91							PlanState *planstate, List *ancestors,
92							ExplainState *es);
93static void show_sort_keys(SortState *sortstate, List *ancestors,
94						   ExplainState *es);
95static void show_incremental_sort_keys(IncrementalSortState *incrsortstate,
96									   List *ancestors, ExplainState *es);

98								   ExplainState *es);

100						  ExplainState *es);

102							   List *ancestors, ExplainState *es);

104								   Agg *aggnode, Sort *sortnode,
105								   List *context, bool useprefix,
106								   List *ancestors, ExplainState *es);

108							ExplainState *es);

110								 int nkeys, int nPresortedKeys, AttrNumber *keycols,
111								 Oid *sortOperators, Oid *collations, bool *nullsFirst,
112								 List *ancestors, ExplainState *es);

114								   Oid sortOperator, Oid collation, bool nullsFirst);

116							List *ancestors, ExplainState *es);

118							 int nkeys, AttrNumber *keycols,
119							 List *ancestors, ExplainState *es);

121							  ExplainState *es);
122static void show_tablesample(TableSampleClause *tsc, PlanState *planstate,
123							 List *ancestors, ExplainState *es);
124static void show_sort_info(SortState *sortstate, ExplainState *es);
125static void show_incremental_sort_info(IncrementalSortState *incrsortstate,
126									   ExplainState *es);
127static void show_hash_info(HashState *hashstate, ExplainState *es);
128static void show_material_info(MaterialState *mstate, ExplainState *es);
129static void show_windowagg_info(WindowAggState *winstate, ExplainState *es);
130static void show_ctescan_info(CteScanState *ctescanstate, ExplainState *es);
131static void show_table_func_scan_info(TableFuncScanState *tscanstate,
132									  ExplainState *es);

134									  ExplainState *es);
135static void show_memoize_info(MemoizeState *mstate, List *ancestors,

137static void show_hashagg_info(AggState *aggstate, ExplainState *es);
138static void show_indexsearches_info(PlanState *planstate, ExplainState *es);
139static void show_tidbitmap_info(BitmapHeapScanState *planstate,

141static void show_instrumentation_count(const char *qlabel, int which,
142									   PlanState *planstate, ExplainState *es);
143static void show_foreignscan_info(ForeignScanState *fsstate, ExplainState *es);
144static const char *explain_get_index_name(Oid indexId);
145static bool peek_buffer_usage(ExplainState *es, const BufferUsage *usage);
146static void show_buffer_usage(ExplainState *es, const BufferUsage *usage);
147static void show_wal_usage(ExplainState *es, const WalUsage *usage);
148static void show_memory_counters(ExplainState *es,
149								 const MemoryContextCounters *mem_counters);
150static void ExplainIndexScanDetails(Oid indexid, ScanDirection indexorderdir,
151									ExplainState *es);
152static void ExplainScanTarget(Scan *plan, ExplainState *es);
153static void ExplainModifyTarget(ModifyTable *plan, ExplainState *es);

155static void show_modifytable_info(ModifyTableState *mtstate, List *ancestors,
156								  ExplainState *es);

158							   List *ancestors, ExplainState *es);
159static void ExplainMissingMembers(int nplans, int nchildren, ExplainState *es);

161							const char *relationship, ExplainState *es);
162static void ExplainCustomChildren(CustomScanState *css,
163								  List *ancestors, ExplainState *es);
164static ExplainWorkersState *ExplainCreateWorkersState(int num_workers);

168
169
170
171/*
172 * ExplainQuery -
173 *	  execute an EXPLAIN command
174 */
175void
176ExplainQuery(ParseState *pstate, ExplainStmt *stmt,
177			 ParamListInfo params, DestReceiver *dest)
178{
179	ExplainState *es = NewExplainState();
180	TupOutputState *tstate;
181	JumbleState *jstate = NULL;
182	Query	   *query;
183	List	   *rewritten;
184
185	/* Configure the ExplainState based on the provided options */
186	ParseExplainOptionList(es, stmt->options, pstate);
187
188	/* Extract the query and, if enabled, jumble it */
189	query = castNode(Query, stmt->query);
190	if (IsQueryIdEnabled())
191		jstate = JumbleQuery(query);
192
193	if (post_parse_analyze_hook)
194		(*post_parse_analyze_hook) (pstate, query, jstate);
195
196	/*
197	 * Parse analysis was done already, but we still have to run the rule
198	 * rewriter.  We do not do AcquireRewriteLocks: we assume the query either
199	 * came straight from the parser, or suitable locks were acquired by
200	 * plancache.c.
201	 */
202	rewritten = QueryRewrite(castNode(Query, stmt->query));
203
204	/* emit opening boilerplate */
205	ExplainBeginOutput(es);
206
207	if (rewritten == NIL)
208	{
209		/*
210		 * In the case of an INSTEAD NOTHING, tell at least that.  But in
211		 * non-text format, the output is delimited, so this isn't necessary.
212		 */
213		if (es->format == EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
214			appendStringInfoString(es->str, "Query rewrites to nothing\n");
215	}
216	else
217	{
218		ListCell   *l;
219
220		/* Explain every plan */
221		foreach(l, rewritten)
222		{
223			ExplainOneQuery(lfirst_node(Query, l),
224							CURSOR_OPT_PARALLEL_OK, NULL, es,
225							pstate, params);
226
227			/* Separate plans with an appropriate separator */
228			if (lnext(rewritten, l) != NULL)
229				ExplainSeparatePlans(es);
230		}
231	}
232
233	/* emit closing boilerplate */
234	ExplainEndOutput(es);
235	Assert(es->indent == 0);
236
237	/* output tuples */
238	tstate = begin_tup_output_tupdesc(dest, ExplainResultDesc(stmt),
239									  &TTSOpsVirtual);
240	if (es->format == EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
241		do_text_output_multiline(tstate, es->str->data);
242	else
243		do_text_output_oneline(tstate, es->str->data);
244	end_tup_output(tstate);
245
246	pfree(es->str->data);
247}
248
249/*
250 * ExplainResultDesc -
251 *	  construct the result tupledesc for an EXPLAIN
252 */
253TupleDesc
254ExplainResultDesc(ExplainStmt *stmt)
255{
256	TupleDesc	tupdesc;
257	ListCell   *lc;
258	Oid			result_type = TEXTOID;
259
260	/* Check for XML format option */
261	foreach(lc, stmt->options)
262	{
263		DefElem    *opt = (DefElem *) lfirst(lc);
264
265		if (strcmp(opt->defname, "format") == 0)
266		{
267			char	   *p = defGetString(opt);
268
269			if (strcmp(p, "xml") == 0)
270				result_type = XMLOID;
271			else if (strcmp(p, "json") == 0)
272				result_type = JSONOID;
273			else
274				result_type = TEXTOID;
275			/* don't "break", as ExplainQuery will use the last value */
276		}
277	}
278
279	/* Need a tuple descriptor representing a single TEXT or XML column */
280	tupdesc = CreateTemplateTupleDesc(1);
281	TupleDescInitEntry(tupdesc, (AttrNumber) 1, "QUERY PLAN",
282					   result_type, -1, 0);
283	return tupdesc;
284}
285
286/*
287 * ExplainOneQuery -
288 *	  print out the execution plan for one Query
289 *
290 * "into" is NULL unless we are explaining the contents of a CreateTableAsStmt.
291 */
292static void
293ExplainOneQuery(Query *query, int cursorOptions,
294				IntoClause *into, ExplainState *es,
295				ParseState *pstate, ParamListInfo params)
296{
297	/* planner will not cope with utility statements */
298	if (query->commandType == CMD_UTILITY)
299	{
300		ExplainOneUtility(query->utilityStmt, into, es, pstate, params);
301		return;
302	}
303
304	/* if an advisor plugin is present, let it manage things */
305	if (ExplainOneQuery_hook)
306		(*ExplainOneQuery_hook) (query, cursorOptions, into, es,
307								 pstate->p_sourcetext, params, pstate->p_queryEnv);
308	else
309		standard_ExplainOneQuery(query, cursorOptions, into, es,
310								 pstate->p_sourcetext, params, pstate->p_queryEnv);
311}
312
313/*
314 * standard_ExplainOneQuery -
315 *	  print out the execution plan for one Query, without calling a hook.
316 */
317void
318standard_ExplainOneQuery(Query *query, int cursorOptions,
319						 IntoClause *into, ExplainState *es,
320						 const char *queryString, ParamListInfo params,
321						 QueryEnvironment *queryEnv)
322{
323	PlannedStmt *plan;
324	instr_time	planstart,
325				planduration;
326	BufferUsage bufusage_start,
327				bufusage;
328	MemoryContextCounters mem_counters;
329	MemoryContext planner_ctx = NULL;
330	MemoryContext saved_ctx = NULL;
331
332	if (es->memory)
333	{
334		/*
335		 * Create a new memory context to measure planner's memory consumption
336		 * accurately.  Note that if the planner were to be modified to use a
337		 * different memory context type, here we would be changing that to
338		 * AllocSet, which might be undesirable.  However, we don't have a way
339		 * to create a context of the same type as another, so we pray and
340		 * hope that this is OK.
341		 */
342		planner_ctx = AllocSetContextCreate(CurrentMemoryContext,
343											"explain analyze planner context",
344											ALLOCSET_DEFAULT_SIZES);
345		saved_ctx = MemoryContextSwitchTo(planner_ctx);
346	}
347
348	if (es->buffers)
349		bufusage_start = pgBufferUsage;
350	INSTR_TIME_SET_CURRENT(planstart);
351
352	/* plan the query */
353	plan = pg_plan_query(query, queryString, cursorOptions, params);
354
355	INSTR_TIME_SET_CURRENT(planduration);
356	INSTR_TIME_SUBTRACT(planduration, planstart);
357
358	if (es->memory)
359	{
360		MemoryContextSwitchTo(saved_ctx);
361		MemoryContextMemConsumed(planner_ctx, &mem_counters);
362	}
363
364	/* calc differences of buffer counters. */
365	if (es->buffers)
366	{
367		memset(&bufusage, 0, sizeof(BufferUsage));
368		BufferUsageAccumDiff(&bufusage, &pgBufferUsage, &bufusage_start);
369	}
370
371	/* run it (if needed) and produce output */
372	ExplainOnePlan(plan, into, es, queryString, params, queryEnv,
373				   &planduration, (es->buffers ? &bufusage : NULL),
374				   es->memory ? &mem_counters : NULL);
375}
376
377/*
378 * ExplainOneUtility -
379 *	  print out the execution plan for one utility statement
380 *	  (In general, utility statements don't have plans, but there are some
381 *	  we treat as special cases)
382 *
383 * "into" is NULL unless we are explaining the contents of a CreateTableAsStmt.
384 *
385 * This is exported because it's called back from prepare.c in the
386 * EXPLAIN EXECUTE case.  In that case, we'll be dealing with a statement
387 * that's in the plan cache, so we have to ensure we don't modify it.
388 */
389void
390ExplainOneUtility(Node *utilityStmt, IntoClause *into, ExplainState *es,
391				  ParseState *pstate, ParamListInfo params)
392{
393	if (utilityStmt == NULL)
394		return;
395
396	if (IsA(utilityStmt, CreateTableAsStmt))
397	{
398		/*
399		 * We have to rewrite the contained SELECT and then pass it back to
400		 * ExplainOneQuery.  Copy to be safe in the EXPLAIN EXECUTE case.
401		 */
402		CreateTableAsStmt *ctas = (CreateTableAsStmt *) utilityStmt;
403		Query	   *ctas_query;
404		List	   *rewritten;
405		JumbleState *jstate = NULL;
406
407		/*
408		 * Check if the relation exists or not.  This is done at this stage to
409		 * avoid query planning or execution.
410		 */
411		if (CreateTableAsRelExists(ctas))
412		{
413			if (ctas->objtype == OBJECT_TABLE)
414				ExplainDummyGroup("CREATE TABLE AS", NULL, es);
415			else if (ctas->objtype == OBJECT_MATVIEW)
416				ExplainDummyGroup("CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW", NULL, es);
417			else
418				elog(ERROR, "unexpected object type: %d",
419					 (int) ctas->objtype);
420			return;
421		}
422
423		ctas_query = castNode(Query, copyObject(ctas->query));
424		if (IsQueryIdEnabled())
425			jstate = JumbleQuery(ctas_query);
426		if (post_parse_analyze_hook)
427			(*post_parse_analyze_hook) (pstate, ctas_query, jstate);
428		rewritten = QueryRewrite(ctas_query);
429		Assert(list_length(rewritten) == 1);
430		ExplainOneQuery(linitial_node(Query, rewritten),
431						CURSOR_OPT_PARALLEL_OK, ctas->into, es,
432						pstate, params);
433	}
434	else if (IsA(utilityStmt, DeclareCursorStmt))
435	{
436		/*
437		 * Likewise for DECLARE CURSOR.
438		 *
439		 * Notice that if you say EXPLAIN ANALYZE DECLARE CURSOR then we'll
440		 * actually run the query.  This is different from pre-8.3 behavior
441		 * but seems more useful than not running the query.  No cursor will
442		 * be created, however.
443		 */
444		DeclareCursorStmt *dcs = (DeclareCursorStmt *) utilityStmt;
445		Query	   *dcs_query;
446		List	   *rewritten;
447		JumbleState *jstate = NULL;
448
449		dcs_query = castNode(Query, copyObject(dcs->query));
450		if (IsQueryIdEnabled())
451			jstate = JumbleQuery(dcs_query);
452		if (post_parse_analyze_hook)
453			(*post_parse_analyze_hook) (pstate, dcs_query, jstate);
454
455		rewritten = QueryRewrite(dcs_query);
456		Assert(list_length(rewritten) == 1);
457		ExplainOneQuery(linitial_node(Query, rewritten),
458						dcs->options, NULL, es,
459						pstate, params);
460	}
461	else if (IsA(utilityStmt, ExecuteStmt))
462		ExplainExecuteQuery((ExecuteStmt *) utilityStmt, into, es,
463							pstate, params);
464	else if (IsA(utilityStmt, NotifyStmt))
465	{
466		if (es->format == EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
467			appendStringInfoString(es->str, "NOTIFY\n");
468		else
469			ExplainDummyGroup("Notify", NULL, es);
470	}
471	else
472	{
473		if (es->format == EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
474			appendStringInfoString(es->str,
475								   "Utility statements have no plan structure\n");
476		else
477			ExplainDummyGroup("Utility Statement", NULL, es);
478	}
479}
480
481/*
482 * ExplainOnePlan -
483 *		given a planned query, execute it if needed, and then print
484 *		EXPLAIN output
485 *
486 * "into" is NULL unless we are explaining the contents of a CreateTableAsStmt,
487 * in which case executing the query should result in creating that table.
488 *
489 * This is exported because it's called back from prepare.c in the
490 * EXPLAIN EXECUTE case, and because an index advisor plugin would need
491 * to call it.
492 */
493void
494ExplainOnePlan(PlannedStmt *plannedstmt, IntoClause *into, ExplainState *es,
495			   const char *queryString, ParamListInfo params,
496			   QueryEnvironment *queryEnv, const instr_time *planduration,
497			   const BufferUsage *bufusage,
498			   const MemoryContextCounters *mem_counters)
499{
500	DestReceiver *dest;
501	QueryDesc  *queryDesc;
502	instr_time	starttime;
503	double		totaltime = 0;
504	int			eflags;
505	int			instrument_option = 0;
506	SerializeMetrics serializeMetrics = {0};
507
508	Assert(plannedstmt->commandType != CMD_UTILITY);
509
510	if (es->analyze && es->timing)
511		instrument_option |= INSTRUMENT_TIMER;
512	else if (es->analyze)
513		instrument_option |= INSTRUMENT_ROWS;
514
515	if (es->buffers)
516		instrument_option |= INSTRUMENT_BUFFERS;
517	if (es->wal)
518		instrument_option |= INSTRUMENT_WAL;
519
520	/*
521	 * We always collect timing for the entire statement, even when node-level
522	 * timing is off, so we don't look at es->timing here.  (We could skip
523	 * this if !es->summary, but it's hardly worth the complication.)
524	 */
525	INSTR_TIME_SET_CURRENT(starttime);
526
527	/*
528	 * Use a snapshot with an updated command ID to ensure this query sees
529	 * results of any previously executed queries.
530	 */
531	PushCopiedSnapshot(GetActiveSnapshot());
532	UpdateActiveSnapshotCommandId();
533
534	/*
535	 * We discard the output if we have no use for it.  If we're explaining
536	 * CREATE TABLE AS, we'd better use the appropriate tuple receiver, while
537	 * the SERIALIZE option requires its own tuple receiver.  (If you specify
538	 * SERIALIZE while explaining CREATE TABLE AS, you'll see zeroes for the
539	 * results, which is appropriate since no data would have gone to the
540	 * client.)
541	 */
542	if (into)
543		dest = CreateIntoRelDestReceiver(into);
544	else if (es->serialize != EXPLAIN_SERIALIZE_NONE)
545		dest = CreateExplainSerializeDestReceiver(es);
546	else
547		dest = None_Receiver;
548
549	/* Create a QueryDesc for the query */
550	queryDesc = CreateQueryDesc(plannedstmt, queryString,
551								GetActiveSnapshot(), InvalidSnapshot,
552								dest, params, queryEnv, instrument_option);
553
554	/* Select execution options */
555	if (es->analyze)
556		eflags = 0;				/* default run-to-completion flags */
557	else
558		eflags = EXEC_FLAG_EXPLAIN_ONLY;
559	if (es->generic)
560		eflags |= EXEC_FLAG_EXPLAIN_GENERIC;
561	if (into)
562		eflags |= GetIntoRelEFlags(into);
563
564	/* call ExecutorStart to prepare the plan for execution */
565	ExecutorStart(queryDesc, eflags);
566
567	/* Execute the plan for statistics if asked for */
568	if (es->analyze)
569	{
570		ScanDirection dir;
571
572		/* EXPLAIN ANALYZE CREATE TABLE AS WITH NO DATA is weird */
573		if (into && into->skipData)
574			dir = NoMovementScanDirection;
575		else
576			dir = ForwardScanDirection;
577
578		/* run the plan */
579		ExecutorRun(queryDesc, dir, 0);
580
581		/* run cleanup too */
582		ExecutorFinish(queryDesc);
583
584		/* We can't run ExecutorEnd 'till we're done printing the stats... */
585		totaltime += elapsed_time(&starttime);
586	}
587
588	/* grab serialization metrics before we destroy the DestReceiver */
589	if (es->serialize != EXPLAIN_SERIALIZE_NONE)
590		serializeMetrics = GetSerializationMetrics(dest);
591
592	/* call the DestReceiver's destroy method even during explain */
593	dest->rDestroy(dest);
594
595	ExplainOpenGroup("Query", NULL, true, es);
596
597	/* Create textual dump of plan tree */
598	ExplainPrintPlan(es, queryDesc);
599
600	/* Show buffer and/or memory usage in planning */
601	if (peek_buffer_usage(es, bufusage) || mem_counters)
602	{
603		ExplainOpenGroup("Planning", "Planning", true, es);
604
605		if (es->format == EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
606		{
607			ExplainIndentText(es);
608			appendStringInfoString(es->str, "Planning:\n");
609			es->indent++;
610		}
611
612		if (bufusage)
613			show_buffer_usage(es, bufusage);
614
615		if (mem_counters)
616			show_memory_counters(es, mem_counters);
617
618		if (es->format == EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
619			es->indent--;
620
621		ExplainCloseGroup("Planning", "Planning", true, es);
622	}
623
624	if (es->summary && planduration)
625	{
626		double		plantime = INSTR_TIME_GET_DOUBLE(*planduration);
627
628		ExplainPropertyFloat("Planning Time", "ms", 1000.0 * plantime, 3, es);
629	}
630
631	/* Print info about runtime of triggers */
632	if (es->analyze)
633		ExplainPrintTriggers(es, queryDesc);
634
635	/*
636	 * Print info about JITing. Tied to es->costs because we don't want to
637	 * display this in regression tests, as it'd cause output differences
638	 * depending on build options.  Might want to separate that out from COSTS
639	 * at a later stage.
640	 */
641	if (es->costs)
642		ExplainPrintJITSummary(es, queryDesc);
643
644	/* Print info about serialization of output */
645	if (es->serialize != EXPLAIN_SERIALIZE_NONE)
646		ExplainPrintSerialize(es, &serializeMetrics);
647
648	/* Allow plugins to print additional information */
649	if (explain_per_plan_hook)
650		(*explain_per_plan_hook) (plannedstmt, into, es, queryString,
651								  params, queryEnv);
652
653	/*
654	 * Close down the query and free resources.  Include time for this in the
655	 * total execution time (although it should be pretty minimal).
656	 */
657	INSTR_TIME_SET_CURRENT(starttime);
658
659	ExecutorEnd(queryDesc);
660
661	FreeQueryDesc(queryDesc);
662
663	PopActiveSnapshot();
664
665	/* We need a CCI just in case query expanded to multiple plans */
666	if (es->analyze)
667		CommandCounterIncrement();
668
669	totaltime += elapsed_time(&starttime);
670
671	/*
672	 * We only report execution time if we actually ran the query (that is,
673	 * the user specified ANALYZE), and if summary reporting is enabled (the
674	 * user can set SUMMARY OFF to not have the timing information included in
675	 * the output).  By default, ANALYZE sets SUMMARY to true.
676	 */
677	if (es->summary && es->analyze)
678		ExplainPropertyFloat("Execution Time", "ms", 1000.0 * totaltime, 3,
679							 es);
680
681	ExplainCloseGroup("Query", NULL, true, es);
682}
683
684/*
685 * ExplainPrintSettings -
686 *    Print summary of modified settings affecting query planning.
687 */
688static void
689ExplainPrintSettings(ExplainState *es)
690{
691	int			num;
692	struct config_generic **gucs;
693
694	/* bail out if information about settings not requested */
695	if (!es->settings)
696		return;
697
698	/* request an array of relevant settings */
699	gucs = get_explain_guc_options(&num);
700
701	if (es->format != EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
702	{
703		ExplainOpenGroup("Settings", "Settings", true, es);
704
705		for (int i = 0; i < num; i++)
706		{
707			char	   *setting;
708			struct config_generic *conf = gucs[i];
709
710			setting = GetConfigOptionByName(conf->name, NULL, true);
711
712			ExplainPropertyText(conf->name, setting, es);
713		}
714
715		ExplainCloseGroup("Settings", "Settings", true, es);
716	}
717	else
718	{
719		StringInfoData str;
720
721		/* In TEXT mode, print nothing if there are no options */
722		if (num <= 0)
723			return;
724
725		initStringInfo(&str);
726
727		for (int i = 0; i < num; i++)
728		{
729			char	   *setting;
730			struct config_generic *conf = gucs[i];
731
732			if (i > 0)
733				appendStringInfoString(&str, ", ");
734
735			setting = GetConfigOptionByName(conf->name, NULL, true);
736
737			if (setting)
738				appendStringInfo(&str, "%s = '%s'", conf->name, setting);
739			else
740				appendStringInfo(&str, "%s = NULL", conf->name);
741		}
742
743		ExplainPropertyText("Settings", str.data, es);
744	}
745}
746
747/*
748 * ExplainPrintPlan -
749 *	  convert a QueryDesc's plan tree to text and append it to es->str
750 *
751 * The caller should have set up the options fields of *es, as well as
752 * initializing the output buffer es->str.  Also, output formatting state
753 * such as the indent level is assumed valid.  Plan-tree-specific fields
754 * in *es are initialized here.
755 *
756 * NB: will not work on utility statements
757 */
758void
759ExplainPrintPlan(ExplainState *es, QueryDesc *queryDesc)
760{
761	Bitmapset  *rels_used = NULL;
762	PlanState  *ps;
763	ListCell   *lc;
764
765	/* Set up ExplainState fields associated with this plan tree */
766	Assert(queryDesc->plannedstmt != NULL);
767	es->pstmt = queryDesc->plannedstmt;
768	es->rtable = queryDesc->plannedstmt->rtable;
769	ExplainPreScanNode(queryDesc->planstate, &rels_used);
770	es->rtable_names = select_rtable_names_for_explain(es->rtable, rels_used);
771	es->deparse_cxt = deparse_context_for_plan_tree(queryDesc->plannedstmt,
772													es->rtable_names);
773	es->printed_subplans = NULL;
774	es->rtable_size = list_length(es->rtable);
775	foreach(lc, es->rtable)
776	{
777		RangeTblEntry *rte = lfirst_node(RangeTblEntry, lc);
778
779		if (rte->rtekind == RTE_GROUP)
780		{
781			es->rtable_size--;
782			break;
783		}
784	}
785
786	/*
787	 * Sometimes we mark a Gather node as "invisible", which means that it's
788	 * not to be displayed in EXPLAIN output.  The purpose of this is to allow
789	 * running regression tests with debug_parallel_query=regress to get the
790	 * same results as running the same tests with debug_parallel_query=off.
791	 * Such marking is currently only supported on a Gather at the top of the
792	 * plan.  We skip that node, and we must also hide per-worker detail data
793	 * further down in the plan tree.
794	 */
795	ps = queryDesc->planstate;
796	if (IsA(ps, GatherState) && ((Gather *) ps->plan)->invisible)
797	{
798		ps = outerPlanState(ps);
799		es->hide_workers = true;
800	}
801	ExplainNode(ps, NIL, NULL, NULL, es);
802
803	/*
804	 * If requested, include information about GUC parameters with values that
805	 * don't match the built-in defaults.
806	 */
807	ExplainPrintSettings(es);
808
809	/*
810	 * COMPUTE_QUERY_ID_REGRESS means COMPUTE_QUERY_ID_AUTO, but we don't show
811	 * the queryid in any of the EXPLAIN plans to keep stable the results
812	 * generated by regression test suites.
813	 */
814	if (es->verbose && queryDesc->plannedstmt->queryId != INT64CONST(0) &&
815		compute_query_id != COMPUTE_QUERY_ID_REGRESS)
816	{
817		ExplainPropertyInteger("Query Identifier", NULL,
818							   queryDesc->plannedstmt->queryId, es);
819	}
820}
821
822/*
823 * ExplainPrintTriggers -
824 *	  convert a QueryDesc's trigger statistics to text and append it to
825 *	  es->str
826 *
827 * The caller should have set up the options fields of *es, as well as
828 * initializing the output buffer es->str.  Other fields in *es are
829 * initialized here.
830 */
831void
832ExplainPrintTriggers(ExplainState *es, QueryDesc *queryDesc)
833{
834	ResultRelInfo *rInfo;
835	bool		show_relname;
836	List	   *resultrels;
837	List	   *routerels;
838	List	   *targrels;
839	ListCell   *l;
840
841	resultrels = queryDesc->estate->es_opened_result_relations;
842	routerels = queryDesc->estate->es_tuple_routing_result_relations;
843	targrels = queryDesc->estate->es_trig_target_relations;
844
845	ExplainOpenGroup("Triggers", "Triggers", false, es);
846
847	show_relname = (list_length(resultrels) > 1 ||
848					routerels != NIL || targrels != NIL);
849	foreach(l, resultrels)
850	{
851		rInfo = (ResultRelInfo *) lfirst(l);
852		report_triggers(rInfo, show_relname, es);
853	}
854
855	foreach(l, routerels)
856	{
857		rInfo = (ResultRelInfo *) lfirst(l);
858		report_triggers(rInfo, show_relname, es);
859	}
860
861	foreach(l, targrels)
862	{
863		rInfo = (ResultRelInfo *) lfirst(l);
864		report_triggers(rInfo, show_relname, es);
865	}
866
867	ExplainCloseGroup("Triggers", "Triggers", false, es);
868}
869
870/*
871 * ExplainPrintJITSummary -
872 *    Print summarized JIT instrumentation from leader and workers
873 */
874void
875ExplainPrintJITSummary(ExplainState *es, QueryDesc *queryDesc)
876{
877	JitInstrumentation ji = {0};
878
879	if (!(queryDesc->estate->es_jit_flags & PGJIT_PERFORM))
880		return;
881
882	/*
883	 * Work with a copy instead of modifying the leader state, since this
884	 * function may be called twice
885	 */
886	if (queryDesc->estate->es_jit)
887		InstrJitAgg(&ji, &queryDesc->estate->es_jit->instr);
888
889	/* If this process has done JIT in parallel workers, merge stats */
890	if (queryDesc->estate->es_jit_worker_instr)
891		InstrJitAgg(&ji, queryDesc->estate->es_jit_worker_instr);
892
893	ExplainPrintJIT(es, queryDesc->estate->es_jit_flags, &ji);
894}
895
896/*
897 * ExplainPrintJIT -
898 *	  Append information about JITing to es->str.
899 */
900static void
901ExplainPrintJIT(ExplainState *es, int jit_flags, JitInstrumentation *ji)
902{
903	instr_time	total_time;
904
905	/* don't print information if no JITing happened */
906	if (!ji || ji->created_functions == 0)
907		return;
908
909	/* calculate total time */
910	INSTR_TIME_SET_ZERO(total_time);
911	/* don't add deform_counter, it's included in generation_counter */
912	INSTR_TIME_ADD(total_time, ji->generation_counter);
913	INSTR_TIME_ADD(total_time, ji->inlining_counter);
914	INSTR_TIME_ADD(total_time, ji->optimization_counter);
915	INSTR_TIME_ADD(total_time, ji->emission_counter);
916
917	ExplainOpenGroup("JIT", "JIT", true, es);
918
919	/* for higher density, open code the text output format */
920	if (es->format == EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
921	{
922		ExplainIndentText(es);
923		appendStringInfoString(es->str, "JIT:\n");
924		es->indent++;
925
926		ExplainPropertyInteger("Functions", NULL, ji->created_functions, es);
927
928		ExplainIndentText(es);
929		appendStringInfo(es->str, "Options: %s %s, %s %s, %s %s, %s %s\n",
930						 "Inlining", jit_flags & PGJIT_INLINE ? "true" : "false",
931						 "Optimization", jit_flags & PGJIT_OPT3 ? "true" : "false",
932						 "Expressions", jit_flags & PGJIT_EXPR ? "true" : "false",
933						 "Deforming", jit_flags & PGJIT_DEFORM ? "true" : "false");
934
935		if (es->analyze && es->timing)
936		{
937			ExplainIndentText(es);
938			appendStringInfo(es->str,
939							 "Timing: %s %.3f ms (%s %.3f ms), %s %.3f ms, %s %.3f ms, %s %.3f ms, %s %.3f ms\n",
940							 "Generation", 1000.0 * INSTR_TIME_GET_DOUBLE(ji->generation_counter),
941							 "Deform", 1000.0 * INSTR_TIME_GET_DOUBLE(ji->deform_counter),
942							 "Inlining", 1000.0 * INSTR_TIME_GET_DOUBLE(ji->inlining_counter),
943							 "Optimization", 1000.0 * INSTR_TIME_GET_DOUBLE(ji->optimization_counter),
944							 "Emission", 1000.0 * INSTR_TIME_GET_DOUBLE(ji->emission_counter),
945							 "Total", 1000.0 * INSTR_TIME_GET_DOUBLE(total_time));
946		}
947
948		es->indent--;
949	}
950	else
951	{
952		ExplainPropertyInteger("Functions", NULL, ji->created_functions, es);
953
954		ExplainOpenGroup("Options", "Options", true, es);
955		ExplainPropertyBool("Inlining", jit_flags & PGJIT_INLINE, es);
956		ExplainPropertyBool("Optimization", jit_flags & PGJIT_OPT3, es);
957		ExplainPropertyBool("Expressions", jit_flags & PGJIT_EXPR, es);
958		ExplainPropertyBool("Deforming", jit_flags & PGJIT_DEFORM, es);
959		ExplainCloseGroup("Options", "Options", true, es);
960
961		if (es->analyze && es->timing)
962		{
963			ExplainOpenGroup("Timing", "Timing", true, es);
964
965			ExplainOpenGroup("Generation", "Generation", true, es);
966			ExplainPropertyFloat("Deform", "ms",
967								 1000.0 * INSTR_TIME_GET_DOUBLE(ji->deform_counter),
968								 3, es);
969			ExplainPropertyFloat("Total", "ms",
970								 1000.0 * INSTR_TIME_GET_DOUBLE(ji->generation_counter),
971								 3, es);
972			ExplainCloseGroup("Generation", "Generation", true, es);
973
974			ExplainPropertyFloat("Inlining", "ms",
975								 1000.0 * INSTR_TIME_GET_DOUBLE(ji->inlining_counter),
976								 3, es);
977			ExplainPropertyFloat("Optimization", "ms",
978								 1000.0 * INSTR_TIME_GET_DOUBLE(ji->optimization_counter),
979								 3, es);
980			ExplainPropertyFloat("Emission", "ms",
981								 1000.0 * INSTR_TIME_GET_DOUBLE(ji->emission_counter),
982								 3, es);
983			ExplainPropertyFloat("Total", "ms",
984								 1000.0 * INSTR_TIME_GET_DOUBLE(total_time),
985								 3, es);
986
987			ExplainCloseGroup("Timing", "Timing", true, es);
988		}
989	}
990
991	ExplainCloseGroup("JIT", "JIT", true, es);
992}
993
994/*
995 * ExplainPrintSerialize -
996 *	  Append information about query output volume to es->str.
997 */
998static void
999ExplainPrintSerialize(ExplainState *es, SerializeMetrics *metrics)
1000{
1001	const char *format;
1002
1003	/* We shouldn't get called for EXPLAIN_SERIALIZE_NONE */
1004	if (es->serialize == EXPLAIN_SERIALIZE_TEXT)
1005		format = "text";
1006	else
1007	{
1008		Assert(es->serialize == EXPLAIN_SERIALIZE_BINARY);
1009		format = "binary";
1010	}
1011
1012	ExplainOpenGroup("Serialization", "Serialization", true, es);
1013
1014	if (es->format == EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
1015	{
1016		ExplainIndentText(es);
1017		if (es->timing)
1018			appendStringInfo(es->str, "Serialization: time=%.3f ms  output=" UINT64_FORMAT "kB  format=%s\n",
1019							 1000.0 * INSTR_TIME_GET_DOUBLE(metrics->timeSpent),
1020							 BYTES_TO_KILOBYTES(metrics->bytesSent),
1021							 format);
1022		else
1023			appendStringInfo(es->str, "Serialization: output=" UINT64_FORMAT "kB  format=%s\n",
1024							 BYTES_TO_KILOBYTES(metrics->bytesSent),
1025							 format);
1026
1027		if (es->buffers && peek_buffer_usage(es, &metrics->bufferUsage))
1028		{
1029			es->indent++;
1030			show_buffer_usage(es, &metrics->bufferUsage);
1031			es->indent--;
1032		}
1033	}
1034	else
1035	{
1036		if (es->timing)
1037			ExplainPropertyFloat("Time", "ms",
1038								 1000.0 * INSTR_TIME_GET_DOUBLE(metrics->timeSpent),
1039								 3, es);
1040		ExplainPropertyUInteger("Output Volume", "kB",
1041								BYTES_TO_KILOBYTES(metrics->bytesSent), es);
1042		ExplainPropertyText("Format", format, es);
1043		if (es->buffers)
1044			show_buffer_usage(es, &metrics->bufferUsage);
1045	}
1046
1047	ExplainCloseGroup("Serialization", "Serialization", true, es);
1048}
1049
1050/*
1051 * ExplainQueryText -
1052 *	  add a "Query Text" node that contains the actual text of the query
1053 *
1054 * The caller should have set up the options fields of *es, as well as
1055 * initializing the output buffer es->str.
1056 *
1057 */
1058void
1059ExplainQueryText(ExplainState *es, QueryDesc *queryDesc)
1060{
1061	if (queryDesc->sourceText)
1062		ExplainPropertyText("Query Text", queryDesc->sourceText, es);
1063}
1064
1065/*
1066 * ExplainQueryParameters -
1067 *	  add a "Query Parameters" node that describes the parameters of the query
1068 *
1069 * The caller should have set up the options fields of *es, as well as
1070 * initializing the output buffer es->str.
1071 *
1072 */
1073void
1074ExplainQueryParameters(ExplainState *es, ParamListInfo params, int maxlen)
1075{
1076	char	   *str;
1077
1078	/* This check is consistent with errdetail_params() */
1079	if (params == NULL || params->numParams <= 0 || maxlen == 0)
1080		return;
1081
1082	str = BuildParamLogString(params, NULL, maxlen);
1083	if (str && str[0] != '\0')
1084		ExplainPropertyText("Query Parameters", str, es);
1085}
1086
1087/*
1088 * report_triggers -
1089 *		report execution stats for a single relation's triggers
1090 */
1091static void
1092report_triggers(ResultRelInfo *rInfo, bool show_relname, ExplainState *es)
1093{
1094	int			nt;
1095
1096	if (!rInfo->ri_TrigDesc || !rInfo->ri_TrigInstrument)
1097		return;
1098	for (nt = 0; nt < rInfo->ri_TrigDesc->numtriggers; nt++)
1099	{
1100		Trigger    *trig = rInfo->ri_TrigDesc->triggers + nt;
1101		Instrumentation *instr = rInfo->ri_TrigInstrument + nt;
1102		char	   *relname;
1103		char	   *conname = NULL;
1104
1105		/* Must clean up instrumentation state */
1106		InstrEndLoop(instr);
1107
1108		/*
1109		 * We ignore triggers that were never invoked; they likely aren't
1110		 * relevant to the current query type.
1111		 */
1112		if (instr->ntuples == 0)
1113			continue;
1114
1115		ExplainOpenGroup("Trigger", NULL, true, es);
1116
1117		relname = RelationGetRelationName(rInfo->ri_RelationDesc);
1118		if (OidIsValid(trig->tgconstraint))
1119			conname = get_constraint_name(trig->tgconstraint);
1120
1121		/*
1122		 * In text format, we avoid printing both the trigger name and the
1123		 * constraint name unless VERBOSE is specified.  In non-text formats
1124		 * we just print everything.
1125		 */
1126		if (es->format == EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
1127		{
1128			if (es->verbose || conname == NULL)
1129				appendStringInfo(es->str, "Trigger %s", trig->tgname);
1130			else
1131				appendStringInfoString(es->str, "Trigger");
1132			if (conname)
1133				appendStringInfo(es->str, " for constraint %s", conname);
1134			if (show_relname)
1135				appendStringInfo(es->str, " on %s", relname);
1136			if (es->timing)
1137				appendStringInfo(es->str, ": time=%.3f calls=%.0f\n",
1138								 1000.0 * instr->total, instr->ntuples);
1139			else
1140				appendStringInfo(es->str, ": calls=%.0f\n", instr->ntuples);
1141		}
1142		else
1143		{
1144			ExplainPropertyText("Trigger Name", trig->tgname, es);
1145			if (conname)
1146				ExplainPropertyText("Constraint Name", conname, es);
1147			ExplainPropertyText("Relation", relname, es);
1148			if (es->timing)
1149				ExplainPropertyFloat("Time", "ms", 1000.0 * instr->total, 3,
1150									 es);
1151			ExplainPropertyFloat("Calls", NULL, instr->ntuples, 0, es);
1152		}
1153
1154		if (conname)
1155			pfree(conname);
1156
1157		ExplainCloseGroup("Trigger", NULL, true, es);
1158	}
1159}
1160
1161/* Compute elapsed time in seconds since given timestamp */
1162static double
1163elapsed_time(instr_time *starttime)
1164{
1165	instr_time	endtime;
1166
1167	INSTR_TIME_SET_CURRENT(endtime);
1168	INSTR_TIME_SUBTRACT(endtime, *starttime);
1169	return INSTR_TIME_GET_DOUBLE(endtime);
1170}
1171
1172/*
1173 * ExplainPreScanNode -
1174 *	  Prescan the planstate tree to identify which RTEs are referenced
1175 *
1176 * Adds the relid of each referenced RTE to *rels_used.  The result controls
1177 * which RTEs are assigned aliases by select_rtable_names_for_explain.
1178 * This ensures that we don't confusingly assign un-suffixed aliases to RTEs
1179 * that never appear in the EXPLAIN output (such as inheritance parents).
1180 */
1181static bool
1182ExplainPreScanNode(PlanState *planstate, Bitmapset **rels_used)
1183{
1184	Plan	   *plan = planstate->plan;
1185
1186	switch (nodeTag(plan))
1187	{
1188		case T_SeqScan:
1189		case T_SampleScan:
1190		case T_IndexScan:
1191		case T_IndexOnlyScan:
1192		case T_BitmapHeapScan:
1193		case T_TidScan:
1194		case T_TidRangeScan:
1195		case T_SubqueryScan:
1196		case T_FunctionScan:
1197		case T_TableFuncScan:
1198		case T_ValuesScan:
1199		case T_CteScan:
1200		case T_NamedTuplestoreScan:
1201		case T_WorkTableScan:
1202			*rels_used = bms_add_member(*rels_used,
1203										((Scan *) plan)->scanrelid);
1204			break;
1205		case T_ForeignScan:
1206			*rels_used = bms_add_members(*rels_used,
1207										 ((ForeignScan *) plan)->fs_base_relids);
1208			break;
1209		case T_CustomScan:
1210			*rels_used = bms_add_members(*rels_used,
1211										 ((CustomScan *) plan)->custom_relids);
1212			break;
1213		case T_ModifyTable:
1214			*rels_used = bms_add_member(*rels_used,
1215										((ModifyTable *) plan)->nominalRelation);
1216			if (((ModifyTable *) plan)->exclRelRTI)
1217				*rels_used = bms_add_member(*rels_used,
1218											((ModifyTable *) plan)->exclRelRTI);
1219			/* Ensure Vars used in RETURNING will have refnames */
1220			if (plan->targetlist)
1221				*rels_used = bms_add_member(*rels_used,
1222											linitial_int(((ModifyTable *) plan)->resultRelations));
1223			break;
1224		case T_Append:
1225			*rels_used = bms_add_members(*rels_used,
1226										 ((Append *) plan)->apprelids);
1227			break;
1228		case T_MergeAppend:
1229			*rels_used = bms_add_members(*rels_used,
1230										 ((MergeAppend *) plan)->apprelids);
1231			break;
1232		default:
1233			break;
1234	}
1235
1236	return planstate_tree_walker(planstate, ExplainPreScanNode, rels_used);
1237}
1238
1239/*
1240 * plan_is_disabled
1241 *		Checks if the given plan node type was disabled during query planning.
1242 *		This is evident by the disabled_nodes field being higher than the sum of
1243 *		the disabled_nodes field from the plan's children.
1244 */
1245static bool
1246plan_is_disabled(Plan *plan)
1247{
1248	int			child_disabled_nodes;
1249
1250	/* The node is certainly not disabled if this is zero */
1251	if (plan->disabled_nodes == 0)
1252		return false;
1253
1254	child_disabled_nodes = 0;
1255
1256	/*
1257	 * Handle special nodes first.  Children of BitmapOrs and BitmapAnds can't
1258	 * be disabled, so no need to handle those specifically.
1259	 */
1260	if (IsA(plan, Append))
1261	{
1262		ListCell   *lc;
1263		Append	   *aplan = (Append *) plan;
1264
1265		/*
1266		 * Sum the Append childrens' disabled_nodes.  This purposefully
1267		 * includes any run-time pruned children.  Ignoring those could give
1268		 * us the incorrect number of disabled nodes.
1269		 */
1270		foreach(lc, aplan->appendplans)
1271		{
1272			Plan	   *subplan = lfirst(lc);
1273
1274			child_disabled_nodes += subplan->disabled_nodes;
1275		}
1276	}
1277	else if (IsA(plan, MergeAppend))
1278	{
1279		ListCell   *lc;
1280		MergeAppend *maplan = (MergeAppend *) plan;
1281
1282		/*
1283		 * Sum the MergeAppend childrens' disabled_nodes.  This purposefully
1284		 * includes any run-time pruned children.  Ignoring those could give
1285		 * us the incorrect number of disabled nodes.
1286		 */
1287		foreach(lc, maplan->mergeplans)
1288		{
1289			Plan	   *subplan = lfirst(lc);
1290
1291			child_disabled_nodes += subplan->disabled_nodes;
1292		}
1293	}
1294	else if (IsA(plan, SubqueryScan))
1295		child_disabled_nodes += ((SubqueryScan *) plan)->subplan->disabled_nodes;
1296	else if (IsA(plan, CustomScan))
1297	{
1298		ListCell   *lc;
1299		CustomScan *cplan = (CustomScan *) plan;
1300
1301		foreach(lc, cplan->custom_plans)
1302		{
1303			Plan	   *subplan = lfirst(lc);
1304
1305			child_disabled_nodes += subplan->disabled_nodes;
1306		}
1307	}
1308	else
1309	{
1310		/*
1311		 * Else, sum up disabled_nodes from the plan's inner and outer side.
1312		 */
1313		if (outerPlan(plan))
1314			child_disabled_nodes += outerPlan(plan)->disabled_nodes;
1315		if (innerPlan(plan))
1316			child_disabled_nodes += innerPlan(plan)->disabled_nodes;
1317	}
1318
1319	/*
1320	 * It's disabled if the plan's disabled_nodes is higher than the sum of
1321	 * its child's plan disabled_nodes.
1322	 */
1323	if (plan->disabled_nodes > child_disabled_nodes)
1324		return true;
1325
1326	return false;
1327}
1328
1329/*
1330 * ExplainNode -
1331 *	  Appends a description of a plan tree to es->str
1332 *
1333 * planstate points to the executor state node for the current plan node.
1334 * We need to work from a PlanState node, not just a Plan node, in order to
1335 * get at the instrumentation data (if any) as well as the list of subplans.
1336 *
1337 * ancestors is a list of parent Plan and SubPlan nodes, most-closely-nested
1338 * first.  These are needed in order to interpret PARAM_EXEC Params.
1339 *
1340 * relationship describes the relationship of this plan node to its parent
1341 * (eg, "Outer", "Inner"); it can be null at top level.  plan_name is an
1342 * optional name to be attached to the node.
1343 *
1344 * In text format, es->indent is controlled in this function since we only
1345 * want it to change at plan-node boundaries (but a few subroutines will
1346 * transiently increment it).  In non-text formats, es->indent corresponds
1347 * to the nesting depth of logical output groups, and therefore is controlled
1348 * by ExplainOpenGroup/ExplainCloseGroup.
1349 */
1350static void
1351ExplainNode(PlanState *planstate, List *ancestors,
1352			const char *relationship, const char *plan_name,
1353			ExplainState *es)
1354{
1355	Plan	   *plan = planstate->plan;
1356	const char *pname;			/* node type name for text output */
1357	const char *sname;			/* node type name for non-text output */
1358	const char *strategy = NULL;
1359	const char *partialmode = NULL;
1360	const char *operation = NULL;
1361	const char *custom_name = NULL;
1362	ExplainWorkersState *save_workers_state = es->workers_state;
1363	int			save_indent = es->indent;
1364	bool		haschildren;
1365	bool		isdisabled;
1366
1367	/*
1368	 * Prepare per-worker output buffers, if needed.  We'll append the data in
1369	 * these to the main output string further down.
1370	 */
1371	if (planstate->worker_instrument && es->analyze && !es->hide_workers)
1372		es->workers_state = ExplainCreateWorkersState(planstate->worker_instrument->num_workers);
1373	else
1374		es->workers_state = NULL;
1375
1376	/* Identify plan node type, and print generic details */
1377	switch (nodeTag(plan))
1378	{
1379		case T_Result:
1380			pname = sname = "Result";
1381			break;
1382		case T_ProjectSet:
1383			pname = sname = "ProjectSet";
1384			break;
1385		case T_ModifyTable:
1386			sname = "ModifyTable";
1387			switch (((ModifyTable *) plan)->operation)
1388			{
1389				case CMD_INSERT:
1390					pname = operation = "Insert";
1391					break;
1392				case CMD_UPDATE:
1393					pname = operation = "Update";
1394					break;
1395				case CMD_DELETE:
1396					pname = operation = "Delete";
1397					break;
1398				case CMD_MERGE:
1399					pname = operation = "Merge";
1400					break;
1401				default:
1402					pname = "???";
1403					break;
1404			}
1405			break;
1406		case T_Append:
1407			pname = sname = "Append";
1408			break;
1409		case T_MergeAppend:
1410			pname = sname = "Merge Append";
1411			break;
1412		case T_RecursiveUnion:
1413			pname = sname = "Recursive Union";
1414			break;
1415		case T_BitmapAnd:
1416			pname = sname = "BitmapAnd";
1417			break;
1418		case T_BitmapOr:
1419			pname = sname = "BitmapOr";
1420			break;
1421		case T_NestLoop:
1422			pname = sname = "Nested Loop";
1423			break;
1424		case T_MergeJoin:
1425			pname = "Merge";	/* "Join" gets added by jointype switch */
1426			sname = "Merge Join";
1427			break;
1428		case T_HashJoin:
1429			pname = "Hash";		/* "Join" gets added by jointype switch */
1430			sname = "Hash Join";
1431			break;
1432		case T_SeqScan:
1433			pname = sname = "Seq Scan";
1434			break;
1435		case T_SampleScan:
1436			pname = sname = "Sample Scan";
1437			break;
1438		case T_Gather:
1439			pname = sname = "Gather";
1440			break;
1441		case T_GatherMerge:
1442			pname = sname = "Gather Merge";
1443			break;
1444		case T_IndexScan:
1445			pname = sname = "Index Scan";
1446			break;
1447		case T_IndexOnlyScan:
1448			pname = sname = "Index Only Scan";
1449			break;
1450		case T_BitmapIndexScan:
1451			pname = sname = "Bitmap Index Scan";
1452			break;
1453		case T_BitmapHeapScan:
1454			pname = sname = "Bitmap Heap Scan";
1455			break;
1456		case T_TidScan:
1457			pname = sname = "Tid Scan";
1458			break;
1459		case T_TidRangeScan:
1460			pname = sname = "Tid Range Scan";
1461			break;
1462		case T_SubqueryScan:
1463			pname = sname = "Subquery Scan";
1464			break;
1465		case T_FunctionScan:
1466			pname = sname = "Function Scan";
1467			break;
1468		case T_TableFuncScan:
1469			pname = sname = "Table Function Scan";
1470			break;
1471		case T_ValuesScan:
1472			pname = sname = "Values Scan";
1473			break;
1474		case T_CteScan:
1475			pname = sname = "CTE Scan";
1476			break;
1477		case T_NamedTuplestoreScan:
1478			pname = sname = "Named Tuplestore Scan";
1479			break;
1480		case T_WorkTableScan:
1481			pname = sname = "WorkTable Scan";
1482			break;
1483		case T_ForeignScan:
1484			sname = "Foreign Scan";
1485			switch (((ForeignScan *) plan)->operation)
1486			{
1487				case CMD_SELECT:
1488					pname = "Foreign Scan";
1489					operation = "Select";
1490					break;
1491				case CMD_INSERT:
1492					pname = "Foreign Insert";
1493					operation = "Insert";
1494					break;
1495				case CMD_UPDATE:
1496					pname = "Foreign Update";
1497					operation = "Update";
1498					break;
1499				case CMD_DELETE:
1500					pname = "Foreign Delete";
1501					operation = "Delete";
1502					break;
1503				default:
1504					pname = "???";
1505					break;
1506			}
1507			break;
1508		case T_CustomScan:
1509			sname = "Custom Scan";
1510			custom_name = ((CustomScan *) plan)->methods->CustomName;
1511			if (custom_name)
1512				pname = psprintf("Custom Scan (%s)", custom_name);
1513			else
1514				pname = sname;
1515			break;
1516		case T_Material:
1517			pname = sname = "Materialize";
1518			break;
1519		case T_Memoize:
1520			pname = sname = "Memoize";
1521			break;
1522		case T_Sort:
1523			pname = sname = "Sort";
1524			break;
1525		case T_IncrementalSort:
1526			pname = sname = "Incremental Sort";
1527			break;
1528		case T_Group:
1529			pname = sname = "Group";
1530			break;
1531		case T_Agg:
1532			{
1533				Agg		   *agg = (Agg *) plan;
1534
1535				sname = "Aggregate";
1536				switch (agg->aggstrategy)
1537				{
1538					case AGG_PLAIN:
1539						pname = "Aggregate";
1540						strategy = "Plain";
1541						break;
1542					case AGG_SORTED:
1543						pname = "GroupAggregate";
1544						strategy = "Sorted";
1545						break;
1546					case AGG_HASHED:
1547						pname = "HashAggregate";
1548						strategy = "Hashed";
1549						break;
1550					case AGG_MIXED:
1551						pname = "MixedAggregate";
1552						strategy = "Mixed";
1553						break;
1554					default:
1555						pname = "Aggregate ???";
1556						strategy = "???";
1557						break;
1558				}
1559
1560				if (DO_AGGSPLIT_SKIPFINAL(agg->aggsplit))
1561				{
1562					partialmode = "Partial";
1563					pname = psprintf("%s %s", partialmode, pname);
1564				}
1565				else if (DO_AGGSPLIT_COMBINE(agg->aggsplit))
1566				{
1567					partialmode = "Finalize";
1568					pname = psprintf("%s %s", partialmode, pname);
1569				}
1570				else
1571					partialmode = "Simple";
1572			}
1573			break;
1574		case T_WindowAgg:
1575			pname = sname = "WindowAgg";
1576			break;
1577		case T_Unique:
1578			pname = sname = "Unique";
1579			break;
1580		case T_SetOp:
1581			sname = "SetOp";
1582			switch (((SetOp *) plan)->strategy)
1583			{
1584				case SETOP_SORTED:
1585					pname = "SetOp";
1586					strategy = "Sorted";
1587					break;
1588				case SETOP_HASHED:
1589					pname = "HashSetOp";
1590					strategy = "Hashed";
1591					break;
1592				default:
1593					pname = "SetOp ???";
1594					strategy = "???";
1595					break;
1596			}
1597			break;
1598		case T_LockRows:
1599			pname = sname = "LockRows";
1600			break;
1601		case T_Limit:
1602			pname = sname = "Limit";
1603			break;
1604		case T_Hash:
1605			pname = sname = "Hash";
1606			break;
1607		default:
1608			pname = sname = "???";
1609			break;
1610	}
1611
1612	ExplainOpenGroup("Plan",
1613					 relationship ? NULL : "Plan",
1614					 true, es);
1615
1616	if (es->format == EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
1617	{
1618		if (plan_name)
1619		{
1620			ExplainIndentText(es);
1621			appendStringInfo(es->str, "%s\n", plan_name);
1622			es->indent++;
1623		}
1624		if (es->indent)
1625		{
1626			ExplainIndentText(es);
1627			appendStringInfoString(es->str, "->  ");
1628			es->indent += 2;
1629		}
1630		if (plan->parallel_aware)
1631			appendStringInfoString(es->str, "Parallel ");
1632		if (plan->async_capable)
1633			appendStringInfoString(es->str, "Async ");
1634		appendStringInfoString(es->str, pname);
1635		es->indent++;
1636	}
1637	else
1638	{
1639		ExplainPropertyText("Node Type", sname, es);
1640		if (strategy)
1641			ExplainPropertyText("Strategy", strategy, es);
1642		if (partialmode)
1643			ExplainPropertyText("Partial Mode", partialmode, es);
1644		if (operation)
1645			ExplainPropertyText("Operation", operation, es);
1646		if (relationship)
1647			ExplainPropertyText("Parent Relationship", relationship, es);
1648		if (plan_name)
1649			ExplainPropertyText("Subplan Name", plan_name, es);
1650		if (custom_name)
1651			ExplainPropertyText("Custom Plan Provider", custom_name, es);
1652		ExplainPropertyBool("Parallel Aware", plan->parallel_aware, es);
1653		ExplainPropertyBool("Async Capable", plan->async_capable, es);
1654	}
1655
1656	switch (nodeTag(plan))
1657	{
1658		case T_SeqScan:
1659		case T_SampleScan:
1660		case T_BitmapHeapScan:
1661		case T_TidScan:
1662		case T_TidRangeScan:
1663		case T_SubqueryScan:
1664		case T_FunctionScan:
1665		case T_TableFuncScan:
1666		case T_ValuesScan:
1667		case T_CteScan:
1668		case T_WorkTableScan:
1669			ExplainScanTarget((Scan *) plan, es);
1670			break;
1671		case T_ForeignScan:
1672		case T_CustomScan:
1673			if (((Scan *) plan)->scanrelid > 0)
1674				ExplainScanTarget((Scan *) plan, es);
1675			break;
1676		case T_IndexScan:
1677			{
1678				IndexScan  *indexscan = (IndexScan *) plan;
1679
1680				ExplainIndexScanDetails(indexscan->indexid,
1681										indexscan->indexorderdir,
1682										es);
1683				ExplainScanTarget((Scan *) indexscan, es);
1684			}
1685			break;
1686		case T_IndexOnlyScan:
1687			{
1688				IndexOnlyScan *indexonlyscan = (IndexOnlyScan *) plan;
1689
1690				ExplainIndexScanDetails(indexonlyscan->indexid,
1691										indexonlyscan->indexorderdir,
1692										es);
1693				ExplainScanTarget((Scan *) indexonlyscan, es);
1694			}
1695			break;
1696		case T_BitmapIndexScan:
1697			{
1698				BitmapIndexScan *bitmapindexscan = (BitmapIndexScan *) plan;
1699				const char *indexname =
1700					explain_get_index_name(bitmapindexscan->indexid);
1701
1702				if (es->format == EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
1703					appendStringInfo(es->str, " on %s",
1704									 quote_identifier(indexname));
1705				else
1706					ExplainPropertyText("Index Name", indexname, es);
1707			}
1708			break;
1709		case T_ModifyTable:
1710			ExplainModifyTarget((ModifyTable *) plan, es);
1711			break;
1712		case T_NestLoop:
1713		case T_MergeJoin:
1714		case T_HashJoin:
1715			{
1716				const char *jointype;
1717
1718				switch (((Join *) plan)->jointype)
1719				{
1720					case JOIN_INNER:
1721						jointype = "Inner";
1722						break;
1723					case JOIN_LEFT:
1724						jointype = "Left";
1725						break;
1726					case JOIN_FULL:
1727						jointype = "Full";
1728						break;
1729					case JOIN_RIGHT:
1730						jointype = "Right";
1731						break;
1732					case JOIN_SEMI:
1733						jointype = "Semi";
1734						break;
1735					case JOIN_ANTI:
1736						jointype = "Anti";
1737						break;
1738					case JOIN_RIGHT_SEMI:
1739						jointype = "Right Semi";
1740						break;
1741					case JOIN_RIGHT_ANTI:
1742						jointype = "Right Anti";
1743						break;
1744					default:
1745						jointype = "???";
1746						break;
1747				}
1748				if (es->format == EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
1749				{
1750					/*
1751					 * For historical reasons, the join type is interpolated
1752					 * into the node type name...
1753					 */
1754					if (((Join *) plan)->jointype != JOIN_INNER)
1755						appendStringInfo(es->str, " %s Join", jointype);
1756					else if (!IsA(plan, NestLoop))
1757						appendStringInfoString(es->str, " Join");
1758				}
1759				else
1760					ExplainPropertyText("Join Type", jointype, es);
1761			}
1762			break;
1763		case T_SetOp:
1764			{
1765				const char *setopcmd;
1766
1767				switch (((SetOp *) plan)->cmd)
1768				{
1769					case SETOPCMD_INTERSECT:
1770						setopcmd = "Intersect";
1771						break;
1772					case SETOPCMD_INTERSECT_ALL:
1773						setopcmd = "Intersect All";
1774						break;
1775					case SETOPCMD_EXCEPT:
1776						setopcmd = "Except";
1777						break;
1778					case SETOPCMD_EXCEPT_ALL:
1779						setopcmd = "Except All";
1780						break;
1781					default:
1782						setopcmd = "???";
1783						break;
1784				}
1785				if (es->format == EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
1786					appendStringInfo(es->str, " %s", setopcmd);
1787				else
1788					ExplainPropertyText("Command", setopcmd, es);
1789			}
1790			break;
1791		default:
1792			break;
1793	}
1794
1795	if (es->costs)
1796	{
1797		if (es->format == EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
1798		{
1799			appendStringInfo(es->str, "  (cost=%.2f..%.2f rows=%.0f width=%d)",
1800							 plan->startup_cost, plan->total_cost,
1801							 plan->plan_rows, plan->plan_width);
1802		}
1803		else
1804		{
1805			ExplainPropertyFloat("Startup Cost", NULL, plan->startup_cost,
1806								 2, es);
1807			ExplainPropertyFloat("Total Cost", NULL, plan->total_cost,
1808								 2, es);
1809			ExplainPropertyFloat("Plan Rows", NULL, plan->plan_rows,
1810								 0, es);
1811			ExplainPropertyInteger("Plan Width", NULL, plan->plan_width,
1812								   es);
1813		}
1814	}
1815
1816	/*
1817	 * We have to forcibly clean up the instrumentation state because we
1818	 * haven't done ExecutorEnd yet.  This is pretty grotty ...
1819	 *
1820	 * Note: contrib/auto_explain could cause instrumentation to be set up
1821	 * even though we didn't ask for it here.  Be careful not to print any
1822	 * instrumentation results the user didn't ask for.  But we do the
1823	 * InstrEndLoop call anyway, if possible, to reduce the number of cases
1824	 * auto_explain has to contend with.
1825	 */
1826	if (planstate->instrument)
1827		InstrEndLoop(planstate->instrument);
1828
1829	if (es->analyze &&
1830		planstate->instrument && planstate->instrument->nloops > 0)
1831	{
1832		double		nloops = planstate->instrument->nloops;
1833		double		startup_ms = 1000.0 * planstate->instrument->startup / nloops;
1834		double		total_ms = 1000.0 * planstate->instrument->total / nloops;
1835		double		rows = planstate->instrument->ntuples / nloops;
1836
1837		if (es->format == EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
1838		{
1839			appendStringInfoString(es->str, " (actual ");
1840
1841			if (es->timing)
1842				appendStringInfo(es->str, "time=%.3f..%.3f ", startup_ms, total_ms);
1843
1844			appendStringInfo(es->str, "rows=%.2f loops=%.0f)", rows, nloops);
1845		}
1846		else
1847		{
1848			if (es->timing)
1849			{
1850				ExplainPropertyFloat("Actual Startup Time", "ms", startup_ms,
1851									 3, es);
1852				ExplainPropertyFloat("Actual Total Time", "ms", total_ms,
1853									 3, es);
1854			}
1855			ExplainPropertyFloat("Actual Rows", NULL, rows, 2, es);
1856			ExplainPropertyFloat("Actual Loops", NULL, nloops, 0, es);
1857		}
1858	}
1859	else if (es->analyze)
1860	{
1861		if (es->format == EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
1862			appendStringInfoString(es->str, " (never executed)");
1863		else
1864		{
1865			if (es->timing)
1866			{
1867				ExplainPropertyFloat("Actual Startup Time", "ms", 0.0, 3, es);
1868				ExplainPropertyFloat("Actual Total Time", "ms", 0.0, 3, es);
1869			}
1870			ExplainPropertyFloat("Actual Rows", NULL, 0.0, 0, es);
1871			ExplainPropertyFloat("Actual Loops", NULL, 0.0, 0, es);
1872		}
1873	}
1874
1875	/* in text format, first line ends here */
1876	if (es->format == EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
1877		appendStringInfoChar(es->str, '\n');
1878
1879
1880	isdisabled = plan_is_disabled(plan);
1881	if (es->format != EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT || isdisabled)
1882		ExplainPropertyBool("Disabled", isdisabled, es);
1883
1884	/* prepare per-worker general execution details */
1885	if (es->workers_state && es->verbose)
1886	{
1887		WorkerInstrumentation *w = planstate->worker_instrument;
1888
1889		for (int n = 0; n < w->num_workers; n++)
1890		{
1891			Instrumentation *instrument = &w->instrument[n];
1892			double		nloops = instrument->nloops;
1893			double		startup_ms;
1894			double		total_ms;
1895			double		rows;
1896
1897			if (nloops <= 0)
1898				continue;
1899			startup_ms = 1000.0 * instrument->startup / nloops;
1900			total_ms = 1000.0 * instrument->total / nloops;
1901			rows = instrument->ntuples / nloops;
1902
1903			ExplainOpenWorker(n, es);
1904
1905			if (es->format == EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
1906			{
1907				ExplainIndentText(es);
1908				appendStringInfoString(es->str, "actual ");
1909				if (es->timing)
1910					appendStringInfo(es->str, "time=%.3f..%.3f ", startup_ms, total_ms);
1911
1912				appendStringInfo(es->str, "rows=%.2f loops=%.0f\n", rows, nloops);
1913			}
1914			else
1915			{
1916				if (es->timing)
1917				{
1918					ExplainPropertyFloat("Actual Startup Time", "ms",
1919										 startup_ms, 3, es);
1920					ExplainPropertyFloat("Actual Total Time", "ms",
1921										 total_ms, 3, es);
1922				}
1923
1924				ExplainPropertyFloat("Actual Rows", NULL, rows, 2, es);
1925				ExplainPropertyFloat("Actual Loops", NULL, nloops, 0, es);
1926			}
1927
1928			ExplainCloseWorker(n, es);
1929		}
1930	}
1931
1932	/* target list */
1933	if (es->verbose)
1934		show_plan_tlist(planstate, ancestors, es);
1935
1936	/* unique join */
1937	switch (nodeTag(plan))
1938	{
1939		case T_NestLoop:
1940		case T_MergeJoin:
1941		case T_HashJoin:
1942			/* try not to be too chatty about this in text mode */
1943			if (es->format != EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT ||
1944				(es->verbose && ((Join *) plan)->inner_unique))
1945				ExplainPropertyBool("Inner Unique",
1946									((Join *) plan)->inner_unique,
1947									es);
1948			break;
1949		default:
1950			break;
1951	}
1952
1953	/* quals, sort keys, etc */
1954	switch (nodeTag(plan))
1955	{
1956		case T_IndexScan:
1957			show_scan_qual(((IndexScan *) plan)->indexqualorig,
1958						   "Index Cond", planstate, ancestors, es);
1959			if (((IndexScan *) plan)->indexqualorig)
1960				show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Index Recheck", 2,
1961										   planstate, es);
1962			show_scan_qual(((IndexScan *) plan)->indexorderbyorig,
1963						   "Order By", planstate, ancestors, es);
1964			show_scan_qual(plan->qual, "Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
1965			if (plan->qual)
1966				show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Filter", 1,
1967										   planstate, es);
1968			show_indexsearches_info(planstate, es);
1969			break;
1970		case T_IndexOnlyScan:
1971			show_scan_qual(((IndexOnlyScan *) plan)->indexqual,
1972						   "Index Cond", planstate, ancestors, es);
1973			if (((IndexOnlyScan *) plan)->recheckqual)
1974				show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Index Recheck", 2,
1975										   planstate, es);
1976			show_scan_qual(((IndexOnlyScan *) plan)->indexorderby,
1977						   "Order By", planstate, ancestors, es);
1978			show_scan_qual(plan->qual, "Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
1979			if (plan->qual)
1980				show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Filter", 1,
1981										   planstate, es);
1982			if (es->analyze)
1983				ExplainPropertyFloat("Heap Fetches", NULL,
1984									 planstate->instrument->ntuples2, 0, es);
1985			show_indexsearches_info(planstate, es);
1986			break;
1987		case T_BitmapIndexScan:
1988			show_scan_qual(((BitmapIndexScan *) plan)->indexqualorig,
1989						   "Index Cond", planstate, ancestors, es);
1990			show_indexsearches_info(planstate, es);
1991			break;
1992		case T_BitmapHeapScan:
1993			show_scan_qual(((BitmapHeapScan *) plan)->bitmapqualorig,
1994						   "Recheck Cond", planstate, ancestors, es);
1995			if (((BitmapHeapScan *) plan)->bitmapqualorig)
1996				show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Index Recheck", 2,
1997										   planstate, es);
1998			show_scan_qual(plan->qual, "Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
1999			if (plan->qual)
2000				show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Filter", 1,
2001										   planstate, es);
2002			show_tidbitmap_info((BitmapHeapScanState *) planstate, es);
2003			break;
2004		case T_SampleScan:
2005			show_tablesample(((SampleScan *) plan)->tablesample,
2006							 planstate, ancestors, es);
2007			/* fall through to print additional fields the same as SeqScan */
2008			/* FALLTHROUGH */
2009		case T_SeqScan:
2010		case T_ValuesScan:
2011		case T_CteScan:
2012		case T_NamedTuplestoreScan:
2013		case T_WorkTableScan:
2014		case T_SubqueryScan:
2015			show_scan_qual(plan->qual, "Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
2016			if (plan->qual)
2017				show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Filter", 1,
2018										   planstate, es);
2019			if (IsA(plan, CteScan))
2020				show_ctescan_info(castNode(CteScanState, planstate), es);
2021			break;
2022		case T_Gather:
2023			{
2024				Gather	   *gather = (Gather *) plan;
2025
2026				show_scan_qual(plan->qual, "Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
2027				if (plan->qual)
2028					show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Filter", 1,
2029											   planstate, es);
2030				ExplainPropertyInteger("Workers Planned", NULL,
2031									   gather->num_workers, es);
2032
2033				if (es->analyze)
2034				{
2035					int			nworkers;
2036
2037					nworkers = ((GatherState *) planstate)->nworkers_launched;
2038					ExplainPropertyInteger("Workers Launched", NULL,
2039										   nworkers, es);
2040				}
2041
2042				if (gather->single_copy || es->format != EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
2043					ExplainPropertyBool("Single Copy", gather->single_copy, es);
2044			}
2045			break;
2046		case T_GatherMerge:
2047			{
2048				GatherMerge *gm = (GatherMerge *) plan;
2049
2050				show_scan_qual(plan->qual, "Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
2051				if (plan->qual)
2052					show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Filter", 1,
2053											   planstate, es);
2054				ExplainPropertyInteger("Workers Planned", NULL,
2055									   gm->num_workers, es);
2056
2057				if (es->analyze)
2058				{
2059					int			nworkers;
2060
2061					nworkers = ((GatherMergeState *) planstate)->nworkers_launched;
2062					ExplainPropertyInteger("Workers Launched", NULL,
2063										   nworkers, es);
2064				}
2065			}
2066			break;
2067		case T_FunctionScan:
2068			if (es->verbose)
2069			{
2070				List	   *fexprs = NIL;
2071				ListCell   *lc;
2072
2073				foreach(lc, ((FunctionScan *) plan)->functions)
2074				{
2075					RangeTblFunction *rtfunc = (RangeTblFunction *) lfirst(lc);
2076
2077					fexprs = lappend(fexprs, rtfunc->funcexpr);
2078				}
2079				/* We rely on show_expression to insert commas as needed */
2080				show_expression((Node *) fexprs,
2081								"Function Call", planstate, ancestors,
2082								es->verbose, es);
2083			}
2084			show_scan_qual(plan->qual, "Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
2085			if (plan->qual)
2086				show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Filter", 1,
2087										   planstate, es);
2088			break;
2089		case T_TableFuncScan:
2090			if (es->verbose)
2091			{
2092				TableFunc  *tablefunc = ((TableFuncScan *) plan)->tablefunc;
2093
2094				show_expression((Node *) tablefunc,
2095								"Table Function Call", planstate, ancestors,
2096								es->verbose, es);
2097			}
2098			show_scan_qual(plan->qual, "Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
2099			if (plan->qual)
2100				show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Filter", 1,
2101										   planstate, es);
2102			show_table_func_scan_info(castNode(TableFuncScanState,
2103											   planstate), es);
2104			break;
2105		case T_TidScan:
2106			{
2107				/*
2108				 * The tidquals list has OR semantics, so be sure to show it
2109				 * as an OR condition.
2110				 */
2111				List	   *tidquals = ((TidScan *) plan)->tidquals;
2112
2113				if (list_length(tidquals) > 1)
2114					tidquals = list_make1(make_orclause(tidquals));
2115				show_scan_qual(tidquals, "TID Cond", planstate, ancestors, es);
2116				show_scan_qual(plan->qual, "Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
2117				if (plan->qual)
2118					show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Filter", 1,
2119											   planstate, es);
2120			}
2121			break;
2122		case T_TidRangeScan:
2123			{
2124				/*
2125				 * The tidrangequals list has AND semantics, so be sure to
2126				 * show it as an AND condition.
2127				 */
2128				List	   *tidquals = ((TidRangeScan *) plan)->tidrangequals;
2129
2130				if (list_length(tidquals) > 1)
2131					tidquals = list_make1(make_andclause(tidquals));
2132				show_scan_qual(tidquals, "TID Cond", planstate, ancestors, es);
2133				show_scan_qual(plan->qual, "Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
2134				if (plan->qual)
2135					show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Filter", 1,
2136											   planstate, es);
2137			}
2138			break;
2139		case T_ForeignScan:
2140			show_scan_qual(plan->qual, "Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
2141			if (plan->qual)
2142				show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Filter", 1,
2143										   planstate, es);
2144			show_foreignscan_info((ForeignScanState *) planstate, es);
2145			break;
2146		case T_CustomScan:
2147			{
2148				CustomScanState *css = (CustomScanState *) planstate;
2149
2150				show_scan_qual(plan->qual, "Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
2151				if (plan->qual)
2152					show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Filter", 1,
2153											   planstate, es);
2154				if (css->methods->ExplainCustomScan)
2155					css->methods->ExplainCustomScan(css, ancestors, es);
2156			}
2157			break;
2158		case T_NestLoop:
2159			show_upper_qual(((NestLoop *) plan)->join.joinqual,
2160							"Join Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
2161			if (((NestLoop *) plan)->join.joinqual)
2162				show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Join Filter", 1,
2163										   planstate, es);
2164			show_upper_qual(plan->qual, "Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
2165			if (plan->qual)
2166				show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Filter", 2,
2167										   planstate, es);
2168			break;
2169		case T_MergeJoin:
2170			show_upper_qual(((MergeJoin *) plan)->mergeclauses,
2171							"Merge Cond", planstate, ancestors, es);
2172			show_upper_qual(((MergeJoin *) plan)->join.joinqual,
2173							"Join Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
2174			if (((MergeJoin *) plan)->join.joinqual)
2175				show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Join Filter", 1,
2176										   planstate, es);
2177			show_upper_qual(plan->qual, "Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
2178			if (plan->qual)
2179				show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Filter", 2,
2180										   planstate, es);
2181			break;
2182		case T_HashJoin:
2183			show_upper_qual(((HashJoin *) plan)->hashclauses,
2184							"Hash Cond", planstate, ancestors, es);
2185			show_upper_qual(((HashJoin *) plan)->join.joinqual,
2186							"Join Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
2187			if (((HashJoin *) plan)->join.joinqual)
2188				show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Join Filter", 1,
2189										   planstate, es);
2190			show_upper_qual(plan->qual, "Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
2191			if (plan->qual)
2192				show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Filter", 2,
2193										   planstate, es);
2194			break;
2195		case T_Agg:
2196			show_agg_keys(castNode(AggState, planstate), ancestors, es);
2197			show_upper_qual(plan->qual, "Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
2198			show_hashagg_info((AggState *) planstate, es);
2199			if (plan->qual)
2200				show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Filter", 1,
2201										   planstate, es);
2202			break;
2203		case T_WindowAgg:
2204			show_window_def(castNode(WindowAggState, planstate), ancestors, es);
2205			show_upper_qual(((WindowAgg *) plan)->runConditionOrig,
2206							"Run Condition", planstate, ancestors, es);
2207			show_upper_qual(plan->qual, "Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
2208			if (plan->qual)
2209				show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Filter", 1,
2210										   planstate, es);
2211			show_windowagg_info(castNode(WindowAggState, planstate), es);
2212			break;
2213		case T_Group:
2214			show_group_keys(castNode(GroupState, planstate), ancestors, es);
2215			show_upper_qual(plan->qual, "Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
2216			if (plan->qual)
2217				show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Filter", 1,
2218										   planstate, es);
2219			break;
2220		case T_Sort:
2221			show_sort_keys(castNode(SortState, planstate), ancestors, es);
2222			show_sort_info(castNode(SortState, planstate), es);
2223			break;
2224		case T_IncrementalSort:
2225			show_incremental_sort_keys(castNode(IncrementalSortState, planstate),
2226									   ancestors, es);
2227			show_incremental_sort_info(castNode(IncrementalSortState, planstate),
2228									   es);
2229			break;
2230		case T_MergeAppend:
2231			show_merge_append_keys(castNode(MergeAppendState, planstate),
2232								   ancestors, es);
2233			break;
2234		case T_Result:
2235			show_upper_qual((List *) ((Result *) plan)->resconstantqual,
2236							"One-Time Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
2237			show_upper_qual(plan->qual, "Filter", planstate, ancestors, es);
2238			if (plan->qual)
2239				show_instrumentation_count("Rows Removed by Filter", 1,
2240										   planstate, es);
2241			break;
2242		case T_ModifyTable:
2243			show_modifytable_info(castNode(ModifyTableState, planstate), ancestors,
2244								  es);
2245			break;
2246		case T_Hash:
2247			show_hash_info(castNode(HashState, planstate), es);
2248			break;
2249		case T_Material:
2250			show_material_info(castNode(MaterialState, planstate), es);
2251			break;
2252		case T_Memoize:
2253			show_memoize_info(castNode(MemoizeState, planstate), ancestors,
2254							  es);
2255			break;
2256		case T_RecursiveUnion:
2257			show_recursive_union_info(castNode(RecursiveUnionState,
2258											   planstate), es);
2259			break;
2260		default:
2261			break;
2262	}
2263
2264	/*
2265	 * Prepare per-worker JIT instrumentation.  As with the overall JIT
2266	 * summary, this is printed only if printing costs is enabled.
2267	 */
2268	if (es->workers_state && es->costs && es->verbose)
2269	{
2270		SharedJitInstrumentation *w = planstate->worker_jit_instrument;
2271
2272		if (w)
2273		{
2274			for (int n = 0; n < w->num_workers; n++)
2275			{
2276				ExplainOpenWorker(n, es);
2277				ExplainPrintJIT(es, planstate->state->es_jit_flags,
2278								&w->jit_instr[n]);
2279				ExplainCloseWorker(n, es);
2280			}
2281		}
2282	}
2283
2284	/* Show buffer/WAL usage */
2285	if (es->buffers && planstate->instrument)
2286		show_buffer_usage(es, &planstate->instrument->bufusage);
2287	if (es->wal && planstate->instrument)
2288		show_wal_usage(es, &planstate->instrument->walusage);
2289
2290	/* Prepare per-worker buffer/WAL usage */
2291	if (es->workers_state && (es->buffers || es->wal) && es->verbose)
2292	{
2293		WorkerInstrumentation *w = planstate->worker_instrument;
2294
2295		for (int n = 0; n < w->num_workers; n++)
2296		{
2297			Instrumentation *instrument = &w->instrument[n];
2298			double		nloops = instrument->nloops;
2299
2300			if (nloops <= 0)
2301				continue;
2302
2303			ExplainOpenWorker(n, es);
2304			if (es->buffers)
2305				show_buffer_usage(es, &instrument->bufusage);
2306			if (es->wal)
2307				show_wal_usage(es, &instrument->walusage);
2308			ExplainCloseWorker(n, es);
2309		}
2310	}
2311
2312	/* Show per-worker details for this plan node, then pop that stack */
2313	if (es->workers_state)
2314		ExplainFlushWorkersState(es);
2315	es->workers_state = save_workers_state;
2316
2317	/* Allow plugins to print additional information */
2318	if (explain_per_node_hook)
2319		(*explain_per_node_hook) (planstate, ancestors, relationship,
2320								  plan_name, es);
2321
2322	/*
2323	 * If partition pruning was done during executor initialization, the
2324	 * number of child plans we'll display below will be less than the number
2325	 * of subplans that was specified in the plan.  To make this a bit less
2326	 * mysterious, emit an indication that this happened.  Note that this
2327	 * field is emitted now because we want it to be a property of the parent
2328	 * node; it *cannot* be emitted within the Plans sub-node we'll open next.
2329	 */
2330	switch (nodeTag(plan))
2331	{
2332		case T_Append:
2333			ExplainMissingMembers(((AppendState *) planstate)->as_nplans,
2334								  list_length(((Append *) plan)->appendplans),
2335								  es);
2336			break;
2337		case T_MergeAppend:
2338			ExplainMissingMembers(((MergeAppendState *) planstate)->ms_nplans,
2339								  list_length(((MergeAppend *) plan)->mergeplans),
2340								  es);
2341			break;
2342		default:
2343			break;
2344	}
2345
2346	/* Get ready to display the child plans */
2347	haschildren = planstate->initPlan ||
2348		outerPlanState(planstate) ||
2349		innerPlanState(planstate) ||
2350		IsA(plan, Append) ||
2351		IsA(plan, MergeAppend) ||
2352		IsA(plan, BitmapAnd) ||
2353		IsA(plan, BitmapOr) ||
2354		IsA(plan, SubqueryScan) ||
2355		(IsA(planstate, CustomScanState) &&
2356		 ((CustomScanState *) planstate)->custom_ps != NIL) ||
2357		planstate->subPlan;
2358	if (haschildren)
2359	{
2360		ExplainOpenGroup("Plans", "Plans", false, es);
2361		/* Pass current Plan as head of ancestors list for children */
2362		ancestors = lcons(plan, ancestors);
2363	}
2364
2365	/* initPlan-s */
2366	if (planstate->initPlan)
2367		ExplainSubPlans(planstate->initPlan, ancestors, "InitPlan", es);
2368
2369	/* lefttree */
2370	if (outerPlanState(planstate))
2371		ExplainNode(outerPlanState(planstate), ancestors,
2372					"Outer", NULL, es);
2373
2374	/* righttree */
2375	if (innerPlanState(planstate))
2376		ExplainNode(innerPlanState(planstate), ancestors,
2377					"Inner", NULL, es);
2378
2379	/* special child plans */
2380	switch (nodeTag(plan))
2381	{
2382		case T_Append:
2383			ExplainMemberNodes(((AppendState *) planstate)->appendplans,
2384							   ((AppendState *) planstate)->as_nplans,
2385							   ancestors, es);
2386			break;
2387		case T_MergeAppend:
2388			ExplainMemberNodes(((MergeAppendState *) planstate)->mergeplans,
2389							   ((MergeAppendState *) planstate)->ms_nplans,
2390							   ancestors, es);
2391			break;
2392		case T_BitmapAnd:
2393			ExplainMemberNodes(((BitmapAndState *) planstate)->bitmapplans,
2394							   ((BitmapAndState *) planstate)->nplans,
2395							   ancestors, es);
2396			break;
2397		case T_BitmapOr:
2398			ExplainMemberNodes(((BitmapOrState *) planstate)->bitmapplans,
2399							   ((BitmapOrState *) planstate)->nplans,
2400							   ancestors, es);
2401			break;
2402		case T_SubqueryScan:
2403			ExplainNode(((SubqueryScanState *) planstate)->subplan, ancestors,
2404						"Subquery", NULL, es);
2405			break;
2406		case T_CustomScan:
2407			ExplainCustomChildren((CustomScanState *) planstate,
2408								  ancestors, es);
2409			break;
2410		default:
2411			break;
2412	}
2413
2414	/* subPlan-s */
2415	if (planstate->subPlan)
2416		ExplainSubPlans(planstate->subPlan, ancestors, "SubPlan", es);
2417
2418	/* end of child plans */
2419	if (haschildren)
2420	{
2421		ancestors = list_delete_first(ancestors);
2422		ExplainCloseGroup("Plans", "Plans", false, es);
2423	}
2424
2425	/* in text format, undo whatever indentation we added */
2426	if (es->format == EXPLAIN_FORMAT_TEXT)
2427		es->indent = save_indent;
2428
2429	ExplainCloseGroup("Plan",
2430					  relationship ? NULL : "Plan",
2431					  true, es);
2432}
2433
2434/*
2435 * Show the targetlist of a plan node
2436 */
2437static void
2438show_plan_tlist(PlanState *planstate, List *ancestors, ExplainState *es)
2439{
2440	Plan	   *plan = planstate->plan;
2441	List	   *context;
2442	List	   *result = NIL;
2443	bool		useprefix;
2444	ListCell   *lc;
2445
2446	/* No work if empty tlist (this occurs eg in bitmap indexscans) */
2447	if (plan->targetlist == NIL)
2448		return;
2449	/* The tlist of an Append isn't real helpful, so suppress it */
2450	if (IsA(plan, Append))
2451		return;
2452	/* Likewise for MergeAppend and RecursiveUnion */
2453	if (IsA(plan, MergeAppend))
2454		return;
2455	if (IsA(plan, RecursiveUnion))
2456		return;
2457
2458	/*
2459	 * Likewise for ForeignScan that executes a direct INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE
2460	 *
2461	 * Note: the tlist for a ForeignScan that executes a direct INSERT/UPDATE
2462	 * might contain subplan output expressions that are confusing in this
2463	 * context.  The tlist for a ForeignScan that executes a direct UPDATE/
2464	 * DELETE always contains "junk" target columns to identify the exact row
2465	 * to update or delete, which would be confusing in this context.  So, we
2466	 * suppress it in all the cases.
2467	 */
2468	if (IsA(plan, ForeignScan) &&
2469		((ForeignScan *) plan)->operation != CMD_SELECT)
2470		return;
2471
2472	/* Set up deparsing context */
2473	context = set_deparse_context_plan(es->deparse_cxt,
2474									   plan,
2475									   ancestors);
2476	useprefix = es->rtable_size > 1;
2477
2478	/* Deparse each result column (we now include resjunk ones) */
2479	foreach(lc, plan->targetlist)
2480	{
2481		TargetEntry *tle = (TargetEntry *) lfirst(lc);
2482
2483		result = lappend(result,
2484						 deparse_expression((Node *) tle->expr, context,
2485											useprefix, false));
2486	}
2487
2488	/* Print results */
2489	ExplainPropertyList("Output", result, es);
2490}
2491
2492/*
2493 * Show a generic expression
2494 */
2495static void
2496show_expression(Node *node, const char *qlabel,
2497				PlanState *planstate, List *ancestors,
2498				bool useprefix, ExplainState *es)
2499{
2500	List	   *context;
2501	char	   *exprstr;
2502
2503	/* Set up deparsing context */
2504	context = set_deparse_context_plan(es->deparse_cxt,
2505									   planstate->plan,
2506									   ancestors);
2507
2508	/* Deparse the expression */
2509	exprstr = deparse_expression(node, context, useprefix, false);
2510
2511	/* And add to es->str */
2512	ExplainPropertyText(qlabel, exprstr, es);
2513}
2514
2515/*
